postToolUse.command: cd '/home/kashish.kapoor/vibecoding projects/financeradar' && for f in $(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M 2>/dev/null); do case "$f" in *.py) python3 -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 || echo "HOOK WARNING: Python syntax error in $f" ;; templates/app.js) node --check templates/app.js 2>&1 || echo "HOOK WARNING: JS syntax error in templates/app.js" ;; esac; done
